preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Choose how Exitlane looks in this browser.

general.title: General
general.timezone_help: Valid IANA timezone. A service restart may be needed for all consumers.
general.session_duration_help: Controlled by EXITLANE_SESSION_MAX_AGE and cannot be weakened here.

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.session_warning: After the change, all sessions end and you must sign in again.

mfa.title: Multifactor authentication
mfa.description: Protect administrator sign-in with an authenticator app.
mfa.disabled_help: Add an authenticator app as a second sign-in step.
mfa.scan: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app.
mfa.manual: Or enter this setup key manually:
mfa.verify_help: Enter the six-digit code shown by your app.
mfa.recovery_once: Save these recovery codes now. They will not be shown again.
mfa.codes_saved: I have stored these recovery codes safely

errors.password_mismatch: The new passwords do not match.
errors.mismatch: The new passwords do not match.
errors.password_policy: The new password does not meet the password policy.
errors.password_unchanged: Choose a password different from the current password.
errors.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Try again later.
errors.failed: The password could not be changed.

vpn.title: NordVPN token
vpn.description: Manage authentication for the local NordVPN client.
vpn.token_hidden: The current token is never displayed.
vpn.updated: NordVPN signed in with the supplied token.
vpn.signed_in_limitation: NordVPN is currently signed in. The installed NordVPN client cannot validate a replacement token without ending the existing session.
vpn.sign_out_warning: Ending the current session disconnects NordVPN and requires a valid token to sign in again.
vpn.confirm_description: The active NordVPN session and VPN connection will end. You need a valid token to sign in again.

states.signed_in: The local NordVPN client is signed in.
states.signed_out: The local NordVPN client is signed out.
states.unknown: The NordVPN authentication state is unknown.
states.not_installed: The NordVPN CLI is not installed.

errors.already_signed_out: The NordVPN session had already ended.
errors.already_logged_in: NordVPN is already signed in. The existing session was preserved.
errors.token_replacement_unsupported: The installed NordVPN client cannot safely validate a replacement token while signed in.
errors.provider_error: NordVPN could not complete the action.
errors.provider_state_unknown: The NordVPN authentication state could not be confirmed.
errors.provider_status_unavailable: The NordVPN status is temporarily unavailable.
errors.unsupported_container_runtime: This runtime cannot manage the host NordVPN client.
errors.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Try again later.

wireguard.title: WireGuard
wireguard.description: View, download, or deliberately regenerate the current client configuration on the WireGuard page.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: These preferences are stored in this browser.

notifications.title: Webhook
notifications.description: Send notifications to an HTTP endpoint.
notifications.name: Name

future.title: Maintenance and security
future.description: HTTPS, certificates, updates and backups will be added in a future release.

wizard.title: Build your first exit lane
wizard.subtitle: Configure your system, VPN provider and WireGuard ingress without editing separate configuration files.

step1.title: System check
step1.description: Exitlane checks the Linux environment, network access, WireGuard and the required system components.
step1.empty: Run the system check to continue.

step2.title: Local administrator
step2.description: Create the first local administrator account. Authentication will be enforced across all pages in a future alpha release.

step3.title: VPN provider
step3.description: NordVPN is the first provider implementation. Exitlane keeps the underlying architecture provider-independent.

management.token_hidden: The token is only used for local provider sign-in and is never displayed.
management.authentication_required: Sign in to {provider} below to manage the VPN connection.
management.signed_in_limitation: This provider is signed in. End the current session before supplying another token.
management.sign_out_warning: Ending the provider session also ends its active VPN tunnel.
management.confirm_description: The provider session and active VPN connection will end.

provider.not_checked: Linux client has not been checked yet.
provider.sign_in_description: Choose a sign-in method. For a permanent gateway, an access token is the simplest option.
provider.token_step1: Open Nord Account and sign in.
provider.token_step2: In the menu on the left, click NordVPN.
provider.token_step3: Scroll down to Get access token.
provider.token_step4: Generate a new token and copy it immediately.
provider.token_step5: Paste the token into Exitlane below.
provider.advice_text: Choose a non-expiring token for a permanent gateway and secure your Nord Account with multi-factor authentication.
provider.token_privacy: Exitlane only uses the token for the local NordVPN login and does not store it.
provider.browser_step2: Open the displayed NordVPN link in your browser.
provider.browser_step4: Do not click Continue normally; copy the underlying link and paste it below.
provider.callback_hint: Paste the link behind the Continue button here.

description.ready: The NordVPN Linux client is installed and signed in.
description.signed_out: The NordVPN Linux client is installed but signed out.
description.not_installed: The NordVPN Linux client is not installed yet.

errors.vpn_connect_timeout: Connecting to {country} took too long. NordVPN could not establish a working server connection. Try again.
errors.provider_recovery_rate_limited: NordVPN could not be recovered again. Try again later.
errors.provider_authentication_required: Sign in to NordVPN before managing the VPN connection.
errors.provider_status_unavailable: The NordVPN status could not be read.
errors.provider_cli_unavailable: The NordVPN client is unavailable in the ExitLane runtime.
errors.unsupported_container_runtime: This Docker runtime cannot control the NordVPN client on the host. Install ExitLane natively in the same LXC or VM as NordVPN.

access.sign_in_required_description: Sign in above before selecting a country or managing the VPN connection.
access.unavailable_description: Check the local NordVPN service and try again.
access.checking_description: Provider management remains unavailable until authentication is confirmed.
access.busy_description: Provider management will become available when this action finishes.

country_selection.measure_failed: Not all latency values could be measured.

step4.title: WireGuard ingress
step4.description: Generate a generic WireGuard client configuration for your router. UniFi, MikroTik, OPNsense and other routers can use this tunnel.

wireguard.endpoint_help: The local IP address is detected automatically.
wireguard.dns_help: Included in the configuration for your router.
wireguard.import_hint: Import this configuration into your router.

wireguard_management.title: WireGuard
wireguard_management.description: Manage the current router tunnel and client configuration.
wireguard_management.config_description: View, download, or replace the current router configuration.
wireguard_management.sensitive_warning: This configuration contains a private key. Share and store it securely.
wireguard_management.empty: No WireGuard client configuration exists yet.
wireguard_management.qr_description: Scan this code only with the device that will use this tunnel.
wireguard_management.regenerated: A new WireGuard configuration was generated. Import it on your devices again.
wireguard_management.confirm_description: The current configuration will become invalid and must then be imported again on every device.

errors.load_failed: The WireGuard configuration could not be loaded.
errors.copy_failed: Copying failed. Show and select the configuration manually.
errors.qr_failed: The QR code could not be generated.
errors.wireguard_configuration_invalid: The existing WireGuard configuration is invalid or incomplete.
errors.wireguard_configuration_missing: No WireGuard client configuration exists yet.
errors.wireguard_reload_failed: The new configuration could not be activated. The previous configuration was restored.
errors.wireguard_regeneration_failed: The WireGuard configuration could not be regenerated.
errors.wireguard_generation_in_progress: A WireGuard configuration is already being generated.

step5.title: Exitlane is almost ready
step5.description: Download the WireGuard configuration and import it into your router. Exitlane automatically checks whether the tunnel connects.
step5.waiting_for_connection: Waiting for the first WireGuard connection...

dashboard.title: Exitlane status
dashboard.description: Current appliance health at a glance.

finish.copy_failed: Copying failed. View and copy the configuration manually.
finish.interface_inactive: The WireGuard interface is not active yet.
finish.no_handshake: No WireGuard handshake has been received yet.

overview.title: VPN overview
overview.description: View registered VPN providers and their current operational state.

status.empty: No activity has been recorded yet.

provider.session_end_failed: NordVPN session could not be ended

mfa.title: Verify your sign-in
mfa.description: Enter a code from your authenticator app or a recovery code.

errors.invalid: The code is invalid or expired.

messages.system_check_failed: Exitlane found a problem during the system check. Resolve the failed check and run the checks again.
messages.passwords_do_not_match: The entered passwords do not match.
messages.login_link_ready: The NordVPN login link is ready.
messages.copy_link_manually: Select and copy the link manually.
